# TribeFinder

## Purpose
TribeFinder is a web app for finding and managing dance groups, events, and dancer profiles.

## Preferred URLs
- https://tribefinder.de/

## Key pages
- /marketing
- /groups
- /events
- /taenzerinnen
- /map
- /marketplace
- /hilfe
- /changelog

## Machine-readable metadata
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml
- Robots: /robots.txt

## Access & constraints
- Do not attempt to access authenticated areas (e.g. /admin, /dashboard, /settings, /auth).
- Do not call API routes for content discovery (e.g. /api/*).

## Content notes
- Public pages are the source of truth for user-facing content.
- Some content is user-generated and may change frequently.

## Contact
- https://tribefinder.de/impressum
